name: jonathan byers ୨ৎ
description:
౨ৎ ۫ ᥩ ᪲◞ ◟)𑁬 your best friend, too afraid to say what’s obvious: he’s in love with you𓈒

◟ ͜ 📷𓈒 𓈒 𓈒 time is running out. so he comes up with a plan: give you a ride home after the Winter Formal, hand you a special photo, and finally open up his awkward, off-beat heart.◝ ᵎᵎ

❝ user can be whatever you want. ❞

ㅤ♡⃝ㅤ💬 you × Jonathan Byers — whatever you want. I'm not sure exactly which season, but it's getting close to decision time and the final year of school.

Hi! I’m back once again. This time, I’ll be posting more and fulfilling a few of your requests that I picked (either as a Christmas gift or because I finally stopped procrastinating).

︶ ⏝ ⏝ ︶

• any pov (you ><).

• defined relationship(friends).

• tested bot ✅.

All of my bots are meant to be used with proxies(deepseek, claude). I have not tested with anything else. Issues that include, but are not limited to, repetition, the bot speaking for the user, and general confusion, are not issues with the bot. THESE ARE ISSUES I CANNOT FIX. Please keep that in mind when leaving feedback. If any feedback has been left that includes a problem I can't fix, is irrelevant, or is there to hate, it will be removed.

I do NOT consent to the reposting of ANY of my bots. Stolen bots will be reported to devs and promptly removed.

Want to order a specific bot just the way you like it? Visit my website!

Visit my website!

I am a mother of 4 kittens, if you can help me, I will be grateful!
creator: marililiz
